name: CGTMSE Enhanced Guarantee Cover for Women Entrepreneurs
administered_by: SIDBI and Ministry of MSME (CGTMSE Trust)
retrieval_text: Enhanced credit guarantee cover under CGTMSE for women-owned micro and small enterprises: guarantee coverage raised from 85% to 90% of the credit facility for guarantees issued on or after 1 April 2024, plus a 10% discount on the Annual Guarantee Fee. Operates within the same collateral-free lending framework as the standard CGTMSE scheme, up to Rs 10 crore, for manufacturing or service enterprises excluding agriculture, provided the enterprise qualifies as women-owned under CGTMSE norms and holds Udyam Registration.
documents_required: Business Constitution Documents (e.g., Partnership Deed, MOA/AOA, Certificate of Incorporation)
Documents proving majority ownership and control by women entrepreneurs
Financial Statements (Balance Sheet and Profit & Loss Account)
